About

A Career Built on Execution, Scale & Strategy

Ravindran Ramachandran is a Vadodara-based business leader and entrepreneur with over 25 years of experience spanning sales, marketing, business development, strategic partnerships, clean mobility, international trade, and venture building.

As Founder & CEO of Tri Tec EV LLC-FZ, a Dubai-based company, he is at the forefront of building full-stack electric vehicle ecosystems across Africa, the GCC, and the Indian Subcontinent — covering electric two-wheelers, buses, battery technology, and charging infrastructure.

His professional journey has taken him across India, UAE, Uganda, Bahrain, Australia, and East Africa, where he has built distribution networks, led international expansions, co-founded manufacturing operations, and developed cross-border trade platforms.

He combines entrepreneurial execution with institutional credibility — serving as Member of the Indian Commonwealth Trade Commission, Mentor at India Accelerator Fund, and Co-founder of Raksha Parv Foundation.

"Identify real market gaps, build strong relationships, create practical business models, and take ideas from strategy to implementation. Commercial discipline, stakeholder alignment, and long-term partnership thinking — that is how sustainable businesses are built."

Leadership Philosophy

Career Journey

28 Years of Progressive Leadership

From sales executive to global founder — a career built on consistent execution, cross-border ambition, and sector-spanning leadership.

2024 – Present
Founder & CEO
Tri Tec EV LLC-FZ · Dubai, UAE

Pioneering full-stack EV ecosystems across Africa, GCC, and the Indian Subcontinent. Driving electric two-wheelers, buses, battery technology, and charging infrastructure partnerships.

2023 – 2024
Chief Operating Officer
Smartech Innovations Pvt. Ltd · Vadodara

Set up a 40M sq. ft. EV automobile ancillary cluster including JV tie-ups, technology transfer, OEM manufacturing, statutory compliance, manpower planning, and financial/legal coordination.

2018 – 2023
President – International Business
Ward Wizard Innovations & Mobility Ltd · Vadodara

Led international business for Joy E-Bikes and VYOM. Drove market expansion, strategic partnerships, brand growth, and international sales across mobility and consumer electronics.

2019 – 2023
Co-founder & Director
Wardwizard Solutions Uganda Ltd · Kampala, Uganda

Co-founded East African operations. Built local manufacturing for LED Smart TVs and battery-powered two-wheelers. Established distribution across Uganda, Tanzania, Kenya, Rwanda, and South Sudan.

2014 – 2018
Director – Business Development
TecSo Global Projects Ltd · Vadodara

Business development and strategic tie-ups for solar sector opportunities and clean energy projects.

2011 – Present
Founder
Sparkle Minds · Vadodara

Built and scaled a marketing and HR services venture delivering branding, PR, advertising, business development, and manpower recruitment solutions.

2010 – 2011
Location Head – Agency Sales
Tata AIG Life Insurance · Vadodara

Led recruitment of business managers, associates, and franchisees. Managed 25+ business associates and an agency base of 250+ advisors.

2006 – 2010
Partner Acquisition Manager / Sales Manager
Kotak Life Insurance & ICICI Lombard · Gujarat

Led corporate agent, broker, and bank acquisition. Managed SME insurance portfolios while supporting premium growth.

2002 – 2006
Branch Head / Business Development Manager
Max Life Insurance & Reliance Life · Vadodara

Led recruitment, training, compliance onboarding, and sales. Achieved $1M in insurance premiums within the first year through 20+ channel partners.

2000 – 2002
Sales Manager & Executive Assistant
Emirates NBD · Dubai & Al Mannai Group · Bahrain

Insurance agency development in Dubai and cross-divisional operations coordination across office furniture, wholesale foods, and engineering in Bahrain.

1997 – 2000
Sales Executive
World Wide Fund for Nature – India · Vadodara

Promoted WWF-India products to corporate clients across Baroda, Ankleshwar, and Bharuch. Supported nature education camps, exhibitions, and franchise appointments.
